Frontier orbital calculation on aniline (14 atoms) using DFT, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Single point on the user-supplied geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz); geometry was not re-optimized at this level. SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true.

Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV (Koopmans-theorem orbital eigenvalue difference; not a vertical excitation energy).

HOMO (index 24): −5.553772 eV
LUMO (index 25): −0.2489544 eV
Total electronic energy: −287.71578 Hartree (−7829.1453 eV)
Occupied orbitals: 25 of 259 total

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 5.5538 eV, vertical EA = 0.2490 eV, electronegativity = 2.9014 eV, chemical hardness = 2.6524 eV, chemical softness = 0.3770 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.5868 eV.
